  "findings": [
    "CSST gas piping is not bonded to the electrical grounding system",
    "Missing bonding jumper and clamp on the gas piping system"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install a minimum 6 AWG copper bonding jumper from the gas piping system to the electrical service grounding electrode system"
  ],
  "rationale": "Corrugated Stainless Steel Tubing (CSST) gas piping must be bonded to prevent electrical arcing and potential fire hazards in the event of a lightning strike or electrical fault. Per NEC 250.104 and manufacturer instructions, a dedicated bonding jumper is required.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 250.104",
    "NEC 250.30"
  ]
}
